title: j-kemble 用 GPT-5.2 Codex xhigh reasoning 等模型构建本地凭证生成与加密管理工具 Generate It

targets.title: GitHub - j-kemble/Generate-It: This is a credential generator and storage built with AI (Warp Terminal/GPT 5.2 codex xhigh reasoning & Claude 4.5 haiku & Gemini-CLI). It runs locally and sets up a secure database for your credential
